---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Description**
What feature would you like to see?

**Gameplay impact**
How would this improve the player experience?

**Roadmap reference**
If this relates to a planned feature in ROADMAP.md, mention the section.

**Technical notes**
Any ideas on implementation approach or files that would be affected.
